pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states survey should be titled 'Service Quality Gap Analysis - SERVQUAL 2024'. SERVQUAL is the Service Quality framework developed by Parasuraman, Zeithaml, and Berry (1988) for measuring service quality.

LimeSurvey source code defines Array Dual Scale as type '1' (const QT_1_ARRAY_DUAL = '1'). This is confirmed in export_result.sh script which queries for type='1' when looking for dual scale questions, and in web search results about LimeSurvey question types.

Task description explicitly states: 'asking participants to rate Importance and Performance for these 5 sub-questions: Tangibles, Reliability, Responsiveness, Assurance, Empathy.' The SERVQUAL framework is documented to have exactly 5 dimensions (Tangibles, Reliability, Responsiveness, Assurance, Empathy).

Task description specifies two scales: 'Scale 1 (Importance): 1=Not at all Important to 5=Extremely Important' and 'Scale 2 (Performance): 1=Very Poor to 5=Excellent.' LimeSurvey documentation confirms Array Dual Scale question type supports exactly two independent answer scales.

All five keywords are explicitly mentioned in the task description. These are the five standardized dimensions of the SERVQUAL (Service Quality) framework developed by Parasuraman, Zeithaml, and Berry. Web search confirms these are the only five dimensions in the SERVQUAL model (originally 10 dimensions reduced to 5 after testing showed autocorrelation).

Web search found the correct LimeSurvey documentation URL. The task.json URL uses parentheses and capitalized 'Dual_Scale' but the actual LimeSurvey manual uses lowercase 'dual_scale' with underscores instead of parentheses. Testing the task.json URL results in a 404 error after redirect to www.limesurvey.org/manual/Question_type_-_Array_(Dual_Scale). The correct URL is https://manual.limesurvey.org/Question_type_-_Array_dual_scale which successfully redirects to https://www.limesurvey.org/manual/Question_type_-_Array_dual_scale and provides documentation about the Array Dual Scale question type.

privileged_info_summary: This task involves creating a service quality survey in LimeSurvey based on the SERVQUAL framework. The survey must contain an Array (Dual Scale) question (LimeSurvey type code '1') with exactly 5 sub-questions representing the five dimensions of the SERVQUAL model: Tangibles, Reliability, Responsiveness, Assurance, and Empathy. The dual scale question must have exactly 2 answer scales - one for rating 'Importance' and one for rating 'Performance'. The survey title must contain the keyword 'SERVQUAL'. The task also requires a long free text question for feedback, anonymized responses, activation of the survey, and creation of at least 2 question groups. The official LimeSurvey documentation URL for Array Dual Scale questions is https://manual.limesurvey.org/Question_type_-_Array_dual_scale.
